title: spiraea alba var. alba
intro: Spiraea alba var. alba, also known as white meadowsweet, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its salicylic acid content. The plant is known to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Spiraea alba var. alba include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make salves and creams for topical application.
